open_items.text: Draft and lock a one-sentence operational objective for the first tiny live autonomy pilot, using the recalled context as input, so subsequent decisions can be checked against that objective.

response: Seeding wake for the first tiny live autonomy pilot now. I will create one concrete, bounded follow-up item and schedule a single wake tied to the provided recall target to resolve it.
